product.name: AriRipstop
product.familyDescriptorPl: Denim i ripstop na odzież outdoor
product.familyDescriptorEn: Denim and ripstop for outdoor wear
product.categorySourceGroup: Ripstop, elasthane and denim fabrics for outdoor wear.
descriptions: It is used mostly for outdoor wear as pants.
AriRipstop can also be used for workear jackets.
technicalParameters: Tensile Strength | Warp > 1800N ; Weft > 1200N | EN ISO 13934-1
Tear Strength | Warp > 35N ; Weft > 40N | EN ISO 13937-2
Dimensional Change | -3% < Length < +3% ; -3% < Width < +3% | EN ISO 5077
Dry Cleaning Fastness | 4-5 | EN ISO 105 D01
Hot Press Fastness | 4-5 | EN ISO 105 X11
Azo Test | No Azo Colorants. | EN ISO 14362-1

possibleButNotAccepted.reason: Ripstop fabric is commonly associated with military/outdoor garments, but no explicit military or uniformed-service use is stated in the product data.

modelOutput.noMatchReason: Product is explicitly described as an outdoor wear fabric used mostly for pants and can also be used for workwear jackets. No explicit application to any taxonomy sector (military, firefighting, energy, welding, motorcycle, hivis, medical, sport, architecture-building, transport) is stated in the supplied data.
